name: agent-daily-review
description: Daily reflection reports for Codex and Claude Code sessions, with HTML output, Telegram delivery, skill packaging, and nightly cron automation.

scripts.test: node tests/test-agent-daily-report.js && node tests/test-agent-daily-report-compact.js && node tests/test-agent-daily-report-facts-store.js && node tests/test-agent-daily-report-truth-guard.js && node tests/test-session-telegram-target.js && node tests/test-run-daily-report-facts-cache.js && node tests/test-run-nightly-report.js && node tests/test-run-nightly-report-quality-gate.js && node tests/test-send-daily-html-report.js && node tests/test-send-daily-html-report-public-config.js && node tests/test-run-nightly-report-public-config.js && node tests/test-install-agent-daily-review-cron.js
